summary: Tested new Revenus section in Admin Dashboard. All backend tests pass (11/11). All frontend UI elements verified including grand total banner, 5 source cards, 3 charts (Area, Pie, Bar), and transactions table.

backend_revenue_breakdown_api.sources has 5 keys: PASS - inscriptions, dons, sponsors, produits, abonnements
backend_revenue_breakdown_api.source fields structure: PASS - each has total, fees, count, label
backend_revenue_breakdown_api.monthly entry structure: PASS - month, inscriptions, dons, sponsors, produits, frais_plateforme, total
backend_revenue_breakdown_api.recent_transactions structure: PASS - type, label, amount, fee, date, status

frontend_revenus_tab.Table headers: PASS - Source, Description, Montant, Frais plateforme, Statut, Date

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (inscriptions 103.85€, sponsors 5000€, pending donation 500€)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Revenus section fully implemented. GET /api/admin/revenue-breakdown returns: sources (5 keys with total/fees/count/label), grand_total, grand_fees, monthly (12 entries), recent_transactions (mixed types). Frontend uses Recharts (AreaChart, PieChart, BarChart). The old 'Commissions' tab still exists separately. Tab-revenus data-testid='tab-revenus'. fetchRevenueData is called on tab click.
